author: DaxAlgo
name: DaxAlgo Terminal strategy plugin
description: A DaxAlgo strategy with a deterministic WPF-free Engine project, optional Windows UI companion, offline tests, signed .daxstrategy packaging, a legacy .daxplugin adapter, and AI-authoring context. Pass --ui for the WPF presentation companion.

ui.description: Also scaffold a WPF presentation companion. It references the canonical Engine project; Engine stays UI-free.
